text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho has arrived. If Mayano
Top Gun can get through this, then...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Gimme the power to win here! I have to get to the
Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Bingo! It is I, Tokai Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But forget that! I have to tell you something,
Mayano! It's a special message from Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. "Mayano! Ever since this spring, you have
been my..." blah, blah, blah... We can skip this
part.
choice_data_list: Are you sure you can skip it?!
Are you sure you can skip it?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's fine! The important part comes right at the
end!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see how much you've improved.
After today, consider us rivals.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Word for word! I totally get what she means. I
wanna face off against you too, y'know!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So you can't lose! Ya gotta win!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Get to the top and leave everyone else in the
dust!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Haha! So you're telling me to be the front runner?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me you only know how to chase!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No way, of course not! ☆ Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So that means you two can't look away while I'm
running. Got it? ♪
